!Rates of dissociations/excitations for each of the electronic states [cm-3 s-1],
!total - rate of excitation to all H2 electronic states (WITH excitations to dissociation continuum);
!Electronic states: B, C, Bp, D, EF, Bpp, Dp, b, a, c, d
!Parameters: 1. excitation (no direct dissociation); 2. direct dissociation; 3. two-step dissociation
!H nuclei concentration [cm-3], nb of times,
! 2.000e+04      151    
!time(s)    total       B1Su_1      B1Su_2      B1Su_3        C1Pu_1      C1Pu_2      C1Pu_3        Bp1Su_1     Bp1Su_2     Bp1Su_3       D1Pu_1      D1Pu_2      D1Pu_3        EF1Sg_1     EF1Sg_2     EF1Sg_3       Bpp1Su_1    Bpp1Su_2    Bpp1Su_3      Dp1Pu_1     Dp1Pu_2     Dp1Pu_3       b3Su_1      b3Su_2      b3Su_3        a3Sg_1      a3Sg_2      a3Sg_3        c3Pu_1      c3Pu_2      c3Pu_3        d3Pu_1      d3Pu_2      d3Pu_3        triplet_1   triplet_2   triplet_3
